objects.name: Analytic 1759
objects.description: Correlates app sandbox escape attempts via unsigned binary execution, mmap memory permission changes (RWX), and sandbox profile violations. Detection chain includes app leveraging JIT/JSC to execute shellcode or triggering kernel exploit via crafted IOKit or Mach port abuse.

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: iOS:unifiedlog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: code signature validation failure / exec of invalidly-signed payload from sandboxed app

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: iOS:unifiedlog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: mmap with PROT_EXEC and PROT_WRITE by sandboxed app

x_mitre_mutable_elements.description: Allowlist known benign unsigned binaries for reducing FP.
Adjustable threshold for RWX page allocation frequency or size.
May require tuning based on OS version and legitimate app usage (e.g., Safari JIT).
